title: Hailstorm Damages Crops in Nilgiris
summary: Recent hailstorms have damaged banana, coconut, and other crops across parts of the Nilgiris, raising concerns among farmers about climate instability.

title: Large Python Rescued and Released into Forest
summary: Forest officials safely rescued a 15.5-foot python from a field and released it back into the wild, highlighting frequent human-wildlife interactions in the region.

title: Tourist Rush Peaks in Ooty and Coonoor
summary: The Nilgiris is witnessing a major surge in tourists during the summer season, with hotels and transport services operating at near full capacity.

title: Nilgiri Mountain Railway Runs Summer Specials
summary: Special train services have been introduced between Mettupalayam and Ooty to manage increased tourist demand during the peak summer season.

title: Electric Boats Planned for Pykara Lake
summary: Authorities are introducing electric motors for boating at Pykara Lake to reduce pollution and promote eco-friendly tourism.

title: Villagers Protest Land Issues with NOTA Votes
summary: Residents in parts of Ooty protested land disputes by initially boycotting elections and later voting NOTA, highlighting long-standing grievances.

title: Action Continues Against Illegal Resorts
summary: Authorities are proceeding with sealing unauthorized resorts and homestays following court support for enforcement measures.

title: Tiger Sightings Near Tea Estates Raise Concerns
summary: Recent tiger sightings near plantation areas have raised safety concerns among workers and residents in the Nilgiris.

title: Hospitals Prepare for Tourist Season Emergencies
summary: Healthcare facilities are on alert to handle increased cases due to tourist influx, road accidents, and wildlife-related incidents.

title: Traffic Regulations Tightened in Ooty
summary: Authorities have implemented stricter traffic control measures to manage congestion caused by the heavy tourist influx.
